79)"},{"text":"，【骇入！】视为4层。"}]}]},"moreInfo":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+15","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+25","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+40","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"200%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"3","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+70","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：附加【骇入进度】概率增加至"},{"text":"75%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：效果命中"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"220%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：效果命中"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：吸取行动进度概率增加至"},{"text":"80%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.e8d7896844901","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"// "text":"潜能提升：生命值"},{"text":"+10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：技能冷却减少"},{"text":"1","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"N8lUrxYZ3jjeZLpj","type":"upgrade-info","data":{"title":"潜能","isShowTabs":false,"tabs":[],"upgradeList":[{"key":"0.685c02bd78f9","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/382722.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/758801.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【别以为我不知道！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"嘿，别以为我不知道你在偷看！说的就是你，超链者！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"怎么，被吓了一跳？没见过连记忆片段都能篡改的异格者？那么恭喜，从现在开始，你见识到了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽说记忆片段这种东西，基本都是因为异格者信任你才愿意让你查看的，但是我可不会这么做。毕竟我的记忆里有不少惊天大秘密，怎么能随随便便给别人看呢？不过你也别担心，我当然也会通过这些被修改过的记忆片段，告诉你一些你能知道的事情——当然，前提是我愿意！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"让我想想，该告诉你点什么呢？嗯，就先从这份资料里没写到的地方说起吧。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我讨厌十三区高校，也和康坦士校长之间的关系不怎么样，这不是什么秘密。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那个老头子建立起「十三区高校」，但与其说这东西是学校，不如说更像是个把怪家伙集中起来、统一管理的大号小黑屋。这里到处都是麻烦的规矩，校规加起来快比辞典厚了，也就风见一宵那种人能把它一条不差地全背下来。我可不想被那种规矩束缚，所以，我每天都在想办法打破规矩。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过，我并不完全讨厌校长。他虽然循规蹈矩，但本身的想法不坏，建造那所讨厌的学校也可能是……我不清楚，反正，老头子或许有他自己的理由吧。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这次就先说这些，等我想好了下次要说什么，再告诉你。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【别小看我的实力！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"嘿，我想好这次应该告诉你点什么了，就来说说我的「光荣事迹」好了！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"先说好，你可要保密啊！这可是货真价实的秘密。如果不是因为「侧写」那一栏里写的东西又少又无聊，我才不会轻易把这些事和别人说呢。毕竟，只靠那点抠抠索索的文字，根本没法让你清楚地认识到我有多厉害！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我干过最开心的一件事，就是入侵了DOKI娱乐的官网，把他们的网站图标改得一团糟。谁让他们那个古板又严肃的老板总是仗着权势欺负蜃都的人们呢！他的所作所为或许被隐藏的很好，可是这种程度的伪装，根本骗不过我。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"光是入侵官网肯定不够解气，我还入侵了他们推出的某著名五字游戏《XX:XXX》的服务器，取消了所有账号的体力上限。虽然我做的那点小改动很快就被修复了，但那些家伙的技术水平实在是有限，至今都没发现入侵他们服务器的是我。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"剩下诸如此类的事情，还有很多，你要是感兴趣，可以在互联网的技术论坛上搜搜我，我可是个名人呢！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对了，要是你能保守这个秘密，那下一次，我就把我最在意的一个秘密告诉你。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【别以为我不会变得更强！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"上回说好了的，这次，我要告诉你我最重要的秘密之一。这个秘密就是，我也有过失败，准确的说，我曾经输给过某个人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那是一场黑客组织之间举办的网络安全攻防赛，优先攻下对方服务器的人就是胜者。凭我的实力，轻轻松松就打进了决赛，而在决赛中做我的对手的，是一个之前从没在网上听说过的神秘黑客，「M」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「M」的水平连我都不得不承认十分厉害，我和那家伙互不相让，大战八百回合···嗯，其实也没有，还是对你说实话好了。「M」的实力绝对不可小觑，那家伙几分钟内就攻破了我引以为傲的防御，而那时候，我甚至还没摸到「M」的漏洞。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这件事给了我不小的打击，在那之前，我一直以为自己的黑客技术已经处在了整个伊瑟的顶端，但那时我才明白，自己的手段在真正厉害的人看来，只不过是小打小闹。但是，也别因此就小看我！我会不断精进自己的技术，总有一天，我会战胜那个神秘的「M」，让那家伙也尝尝当我手下败将的滋味！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这只是我诸多秘密中的一个，我猜，你一定还很好奇其他的吧？或许哪天等我来兴致了，就把它们告诉你。当然，你也可以努努力，变成强到足以打败我的黑客，把我的秘密都挖出来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我很期待，伊瑟能多一个和我平起平坐的强大黑客！"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE万金油破甲手（适用90%副本），同时具备：偷行动条、群体破甲、光环型增伤、减伤"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 111即可成型（省资源）|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性堆效果命中 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 重构兵祸、 多琪、炼狱津等副本破甲实现增伤速刷"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"（当前版本仍为T0级工具人）"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8时光+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/85952.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"Cz5QDzWMYTA07Mqm","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
